testcase.name: [CA-01] Añadir mascota

failure.message:
match failed: EQUALS $ | not equal (STRING:STRING) 'vendido_xyz' 'available'
classpath:features/pet.feature:43

testcase.failure:
* url 'https://petstore.swagger.io/v2' .................................... passed * header Content-Type = 'application/json' ................................ passed * header Accept = 'application/json' ................................ passed * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'lucas_' + petId .......................................... passed * print '>>> Pet ID para esta ejecución:', petId .......................... passed * def bodyBase = .......................................................... passed Given path '/pet' ......................................................... passed And request bodyBase ...................................................... passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed And match response.id == petId .................................... passed And match response.name == petName .................................. passed And match response.status == 'available' .............................. failed
Stack Trace: com.intuit.karate.KarateException: match failed: EQUALS $ | not equal (STRING:STRING) 'vendido_xyz' 'available'
classpath:features/pet.feature:43 at <feature>.: And match response.status == 'available' (classpath:features/pet.feature:43:43)
* print '>>> Mascota creada OK. ID:', response.id, '| Name:', response.name . skipped

testcase.name: [CA-02] POST /pet/ con status inválido (no está en enum)
testcase.system-out: * url 'https://petstore.swagger.io/v2' .................................... passed * header Content-Type = 'application/json' ................................ passed * header Accept = 'application/json' ................................ passed * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'lucas_' + petId .......................................... passed * print '>>> Pet ID para esta ejecución:', petId .......................... passed * def bodyBase = .......................................................... passed Given path '/pet/' ........................................................ passed And request bodyBase ...................................................... passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed * print '>>> ALERTA QA: API acepta status fuera del enum. Valor guardado:', response.status . passed

testcase.name: [CA-03] POST /pet/ con status inválido (no está en enum)

failure.message:
match failed: EQUALS $ | not equal (STRING:STRING) 'lucas_218937' ''
classpath:features/pet.feature:58

testcase.failure:
* url 'https://petstore.swagger.io/v2' .................................... passed * header Content-Type = 'application/json' ................................ passed * header Accept = 'application/json' ................................ passed * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'lucas_' + petId .......................................... passed * print '>>> Pet ID para esta ejecución:', petId .......................... passed * def bodyBase = .......................................................... passed Given path '/pet/' ........................................................ passed And request bodyBase ...................................................... passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed And match response.name == '' ............................................. failed

testcase.name: [CA-04] POST /pet/ sin el campo name (campo requerido)
[CB-05] POST /pet/ con body vacío {}

failure.message: no step-definition method match found for: status != 200 classpath:features/pet.feature:82

testcase.failure:
* url 'https://petstore.swagger.io/v2' .................................... passed * header Content-Type = 'application/json' ................................ passed * header Accept = 'application/json' ................................ passed * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'lucas_' + petId .......................................... passed * print '>>> Pet ID para esta ejecución:', petId .......................... passed * def bodyBase = .......................................................... passed Given path '/pet/' ........................................................ passed And request {} ............................................................ passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status != 200 ........................................................ failed
